placeholders.{BLOCK_NAME}: sns-share-links (kebab-case — block name, file names, JSON IDs, block wrapper class)
placeholders.{BLOCK_CHILD}: sns-share-link (kebab-case — singular item class, child JSON IDs/models)
placeholders.{BLOCK_ROOT}: sns-share (kebab-case — common root prefix for derived names: toast, click, animation keyframes)
placeholders.{BLOCK_FUNC}: SNS Share Links (title-case — display titles in Storybook, JSON template names)
placeholders.{BLOCK_CHILD_FUNC}: SNS Share Link (title-case — singular display titles in JSON definitions)

rootNamingNote._important: This block uses a ROOT PREFIX naming pattern. The block wrapper is 'sns-share-links', each item is 'sns-share-link', and derived UI elements use the root prefix 'sns-share' (e.g., 'sns-share-toast', 'sns-share-click', 'sns-share-toast-fade'). When renaming, derive {BLOCK_ROOT} by removing the '-links' suffix from {BLOCK_NAME} (e.g., 'social-share-links' → root 'social-share'; 'share-buttons' → root 'share-button').

placeholderConstantsNote._important: The JS file imports 16 SNS_* constants from 'constants/placeholders-constants.js'. These constant NAMES (e.g., SNS_LINKEDIN_NAME) and their camelCase VALUES (e.g., 'snsLinkedinName') are NOT replaced with placeholders because they are shared i18n keys used across the project. See 'placeholders-constants-snippet.js' for the full list. If renaming the block, you MAY optionally rename these constants, but the placeholder key strings MUST match your project's placeholders spreadsheet.

replacements.context: block wrapper class, file names, JSON IDs, filter IDs

toast class, analytics event, keyframe animation name
JSON definition title, child template name

replacements.note: NOT replaced — 16 placeholder constant names from shared constants file (SNS_LINKEDIN_NAME, SNS_FACEBOOK_SHARE_URL, etc.)
NOT replaced — internal function names using 'SNS' abbreviation. Rename manually if desired.
